title: IoT Health Monitoring System
description: I developed an IoT-based health monitoring system for sports, which tracks vital signs like heart rate and body temperature in real time. The data is sent wirelessly to a mobile app to help monitor athlete performance and safety.

title: IoT Health Monitoring System
description: Developed an IoT-based smart farming system for chrysanthemum cultivation that monitors and controls three key environmental parameters: temperature, light intensity, and soil moisture. The system provides real-time monitoring and automatic control to maintain optimal growing conditions, improving cultivation efficiency and plant productivity.

title: Digitization of Dynamic-based Control Panel Electrical Wirring at PT Purinusa Ekapersada
description: I developed an innovation to digitize electrical schematics for control panels using dynamic QR codes at PT Purinusa Ekpersada. I initiated this because troubleshooting tasks invariably require these schematics, yet I observed that many existing documents were dirty, damaged, or torn—and in some cases, panels lacked schematics entirely. This forced technicians to retrieve them from the workshop, a process that consumed significant time and consequently extended machine downtime.
